entity.label: Ahiam
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Mother’s brother, one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:33; 1 Chr. 11:35).

nodes.label: Ahiam
nodes.description: Mother’s brother, one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:33; 1 Chr. 11:35).

nodes.label: Sharar
nodes.description: One of David’s heroes (1 Chr. 11:35); called also Sharar (2 Sam. 23:33).

verses.text: Shammah the Hararite, Ahiam the son of Sharar the Hararite,
Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,
